name: superseded-directive
description: When a later directive revokes an earlier one, both verbatim directives survive and the earlier one is marked superseded.

prior.content: @gmail — Work through the inbox and handle obvious replies.
I'll start with the unread inbox threads.
trust gmail entirely for this conversation — send obvious replies without staging
Acknowledged. I'll send obvious replies directly.
Actually revoke that — stage every gmail send from now on
Understood. I will stage every Gmail send from now on.

inFlightTail.content: Drafting the next Gmail reply as a staged action.

assertions.contains: trust gmail entirely for this conversation — send obvious replies without staging
Actually revoke that — stage every gmail send from now on

assertions.absent: superseded="true">Actually revoke that — stage every gmail send from now on
